title: ivesia callida
intro: Ivesia callida, also known as silky ivesia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. It is a perennial herb with hairy stems and leaves, and is native to the western United States. The medicinal properties of Ivesia callida include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds and skin conditions. The plant has been used in herbal preparations such as salves and infusions, which are said to have health benefits including soothing skin irritations and promoting wound healing.
